con:settings.con:setting: <xml-fragment xmlns:con="http://eviware.com/soapui/config"> <con:entry key="EXSH" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Java Args" value=""/> <con:entry key="Class Folder" value=""/> <con:entry key="Exclude namespaces" value="<xml-fragment/>"/> <con:entry key="build.xml" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Bindings" value=""/> <con:entry key="Implementation" value="true"/> <con:entry key="Server" value="true"/> <con:entry key="Tool Args" value=""/> <con:entry key="Output Packages" value="<xml-fragment/>"/> <con:entry key="All Code" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Use cached WSDL" value="true"/> <con:entry key="DEX" value="true"/> <con:entry key="Validate WSDL" value="false"/> <con:entry key="Output Directory" value="C:\dev\Projects\CLNBPrioritization\OPTA\cxf"/> <con:entry key="Compile" value="false"/> <con:entry key="WSDL" value="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT?wsdl"/> <con:entry key="DNS" value="true"/> <con:entry key="Catalog" value=""/> <con:entry key="Package" value=""/> <con:entry key="Client" value="true"/> </xml-fragment>

con:part.con:content: <wsdl:definitions name="OptaSingleService" targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:wsp="http://www.w3.org/ns/ws-policy" xmlns:wsu="http://docs.oasis-open.org/wss/2004/01/oasis-200401-wss-wssecurity-utility-1.0.xsd" xmlns:sp="http://docs.oasis-open.org/ws-sx/ws-securitypolicy/200702" xmlns:opta="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <!--types--> <wsdl:types> <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSRequest.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:element name="OSSRequest" type="OSSRequestType"/> <xsd:element name="OSSResponse" type="OSSResponseType"/> </xsd:schema> </wsdl:types> <!--message--> <wsdl:message name="OSSRequestMessage"> <wsdl:part name="Request" element="opta:OSSRequest"/> </wsdl:message> <wsdl:message name="OSSResponseMessage"> <wsdl:part name="Response" element="opta:OSSResponse"/> </wsdl:message> <!--port--> <wsdl:portType name="OptaSingleServicePort"> <wsdl:operation name="call"> <wsdl:input message="opta:OSSRequestMessage"/> <wsdl:output message="opta:OSSResponseMessage"/> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:portType> <!--binding--> <wsdl:binding name="OptaSingleServiceBinding" type="opta:OptaSingleServicePort"> <soap:binding transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http" style="document"/> <wsdl:operation name="call"> <soap:operation soapAction=""/> <wsdl:input> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:input> <wsdl:output> <soap:body use="literal"/> </wsdl:output> </wsdl:operation> </wsdl:binding> <!--service--> <wsdl:service name="OptaSingleService"> <wsdl:documentation>TODO fill in some documentation here</wsdl:documentation> <wsdl:port name="OptaSingleServicePort" binding="opta:OptaSingleServiceBinding"> <wsp:PolicyReference URI="#OptaSingleServiceServiceSoapBindingPolicy"/> <soap:address location="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/OptaSingleService"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> <!--policy--> <wsp:Policy wsu:Id="OptaSingleServiceServiceSoapBindingPolicy"> <wsp:ExactlyOne> <wsp:All> <sp:SupportingTokens> <wsp:Policy> <sp:UsernameToken sp:IncludeToken="http://docs.oasis-open.org/ws-sx/ws-securitypolicy/200702/IncludeToken/AlwaysToRecipient"> <wsp:Policy> <sp:WssUsernameToken11/> </wsp:Policy> </sp:UsernameToken> </wsp:Policy> </sp:SupportingTokens> </wsp:All> </wsp:ExactlyOne> </wsp:Policy> </wsdl:definitions>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="OSSRequestType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RequestHeader" type="RequestHeaderType"/> <xsd:element name="RequestBody" type="RequestBodyType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestHeaderType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RequestID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RequestSentTimestamp" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="Requestor" type="RequestorType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestorType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Carrier" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="Brokerage" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="Username" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestBodyType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Address" type="RequestAddressType" maxOccurs="10"/> <xsd:element name="RequestedProducts" type="RequestedProductsType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestAddressType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="AddressID" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="OptaAddressKey" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:choice> <xsd:element name="StreetAddress" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="StreetNumber" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="StreetName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="StreetType" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="StreetDirection" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="UnitNumber" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:choice> <xsd:element name="Municipality" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Province" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="PostalCode" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="UserProvidedConstructionFeatures" type="RequestResidentialConstructionFeaturesType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestResidentialConstructionFeaturesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="YearBuilt" type="YearBuiltType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="SquareFootage" type="SquareFootageType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="FoundationType" type="FoundationType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="ArchitecturalStyleType" type="ArchitecturalStyleType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="StoreyCount" type="ResidentialStoreyCountType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="KitchenCount" type="ResidentialKitchenCountType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="BathroomCount" type="ResidentialBathroomCountType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="ExteriorWallType" type="ExteriorWallType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="RoofType" type="RoofType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="FinishedBasement" type="FinishedBasementType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="GarageType" type="GarageType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="GarageNumberOfCars" type="GarageNumberOfCarsType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="SwimmingPoolType" type="SwimmingPoolType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="PrimaryHeatingType" type="PrimaryHeatingType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="AuxiliaryHeatingType" type="AuxiliaryHeatingType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="PlumbingType" type="PlumbingType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="CommercialIndicator" type="xsd:boolean" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="OutbuildingPresent" type="BooleanWithUnknownType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RequestedProductsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Product" type="ProductType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="ProductType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="iClarifyResidential"/> <xsd:enumeration value="iClarifyCommercialOccupancy"/> <xsd:enumeration value="CommercialPerilScore"/> <xsd:enumeration value="FUS"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-Water"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-Sewer"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-Fire"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-WindHail"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-Theft"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PerilScore-AllPerils"/> <xsd:enumeration value="FloodScore"/> <xsd:enumeration value="FloodScore-Fluvial"/> <xsd:enumeration value="InspectionScore"/> <xsd:enumeration value="InspectionAttributes"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:simpleType name="OptaAddressKeyType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{2}[A-Z]\-\d{2}[A-Z]\-\d{2}[A-Z]$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="UnparsedStreetAddressType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="200"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="StreetNumberType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^[A-Za-z]{0,}\d{1,}[A-Za-z]{0,}$"/> <xsd:maxLength value="10"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="StreetNameType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="100"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="StreetTypeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="10"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="StreetDirectionType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="20"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="UnitNumberType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="10"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="MunicipalityType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="100"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ProvinceType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="AB"/> <xsd:enumeration value="BC"/> <xsd:enumeration value="MB"/> <xsd:enumeration value="NB"/> <xsd:enumeration value="NL"/> <xsd:enumeration value="NS"/> <xsd:enumeration value="NT"/> <xsd:enumeration value="NU"/> <xsd:enumeration value="ON"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PE"/> <xsd:enumeration value="QC"/> <xsd:enumeration value="SK"/> <xsd:enumeration value="YT"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="PostalCodeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^([A-Z]\d){3}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="GeocodeType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Latitude" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="Longitude" type="xsd:double"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="EmailAddressType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\w+@[a-zA-Z_]+?\.[a-zA-Z]{2,3}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="BooleanWithUnknownType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="true"/> <xsd:enumeration value="false"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unknown"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="YearBuiltType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{4}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="SquareFootageType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"/> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="FoundationType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Basement"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Crawlspace"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Pier"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Slab on Grade"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Walkout Basement"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ArchitecturalStyleType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Detached"/> <xsd:enumeration value="End Row"/> <xsd:enumeration value="In Row"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Semi Detached"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Duplex"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Triplex"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Quadplex"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Fiveplex"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Sixplex"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ResidentialStoreyCountType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <xsd:enumeration value="1.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="4"/> <xsd:enumeration value="BiLevel"/> <xsd:enumeration value="TriLevel"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ResidentialKitchenCountType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3"/> <xsd:enumeration value="More"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ResidentialBathroomCountType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <xsd:enumeration value="1.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="4"/> <xsd:enumeration value="4.5"/> <xsd:enumeration value="More"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ExteriorWallType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Brick"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Brick Veneer"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Concrete"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Hardie Board"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Logs"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Stone"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Stone Veneer"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Stucco"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Vinyl Siding"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Wood Siding"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="RoofType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Asphalt"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Clay Tile"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Concrete"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Copper"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Rubber"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Slate Tile"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Steel"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Tar and Gravel"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Tin"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Wood Shingles"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="FinishedBasementType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:boolean"/> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="GarageType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Attached Garage"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Built-in Garage"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Basement Garage"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="GarageNumberOfCarsType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"> <xsd:enumeration value="1"/> <xsd:enumeration value="2"/> <xsd:enumeration value="3"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="SwimmingPoolType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Inground Concrete"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Inground Fibre Glass"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Inground Vinyl"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Above Ground"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Above Ground Fibre Glass"/> <xsd:enumeration value="None"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unknown"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="PrimaryHeatingType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Geothermal"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Radiant"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Electric"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Natural Gas Forced Air"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Oil"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Water"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Wood"/> <xsd:enumeration value="None"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unknown"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="AuxiliaryHeatingType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Fireplace"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Woodstove"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Wood Furnace"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Pellet Stove"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Electric"/> <xsd:enumeration value="None"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unknown"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="PlumbingType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Copper"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Galvanized"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Iron"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PVC"/> <xsd:enumeration value="ABS"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Pex"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unknown"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="CurrencyType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="CAD"/> <xsd:enumeration value="USD"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="SICCodeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{4}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="IBCCodeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{4}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="NAICSCodeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{6}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="MultilingualStringType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="en" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="fr" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="ServiceModeType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="ComparativeRater"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ProductResponseStatusType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Success"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Failed"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unauthorized"/> <xsd:enumeration value="ProductNotFound"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="MessageType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:maxLength value="255"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="AnyType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:any minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseIClarifyResidential.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseCommercialPerilScore.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseIClarifyCommercialOccupancy.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseFUS.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponsePerilScore.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseFloodScore.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseInspectionScore.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponseInspectionAttributes.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="OSSResponseType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ResponseHeader" type="ResponseHeaderType"/> <xsd:element name="ResponseBody" type="ResponseBodyType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResponseHeaderType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RequestID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="RequestReceivedTimestamp" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="ResponseSentTimestamp" type="xsd:dateTime"/> <xsd:element name="ElapsedMilliseconds" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="ServiceVersion" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Request" type="AnyType"/> <xsd:element name="Debug" type="AnyType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResponseBodyType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Result" type="ResultType" maxOccurs="10"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResultType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ActivityID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Address" type="ResponseAddressType"/> <xsd:element name="ProductResults" type="ProductResultsType"/> <xsd:element name="Message" type="MessageType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResponseAddressType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="AddressID" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="OptaAddressKey" type="OptaAddressKeyType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="StreetNumber" type="StreetNumberType"/> <xsd:element name="StreetName" type="StreetNameType"/> <xsd:element name="StreetType" type="StreetTypeType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="StreetDirection" type="StreetDirectionType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="UnitNumber" type="UnitNumberType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="Municipality" type="MunicipalityType"/> <xsd:element name="Province" type="ProvinceType"/> <xsd:element name="PostalCode" type="PostalCodeType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ProductResultsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:choice maxOccurs="unbounded"> <xsd:element name="iClarifyResidentialProduct" type="iClarifyResidentialProductType"/> <xsd:element name="CommercialPerilScoreProduct" type="CommercialPerilScoreProductType"/> <xsd:element name="iClarifyCommercialOccupancyProduct" type="iClarifyCommercialOccupancyProductType"/> <xsd:element name="FUSProduct" type="FUSProductType"/> <xsd:element name="PerilScoreProduct" type="PerilScoreProductType"/> <xsd:element name="FloodScoreProduct" type="FloodScoreProductType"/> <xsd:element name="InspectionScoreProduct" type="InspectionScoreProductType"/> <xsd:element name="InspectionAttributesProduct" type="InspectionAttributesProductType"/> </xsd:choice> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="StatusCode" type="ProductResponseStatusType"/> <xsd:element name="ServiceMode" type="ServiceModeType"/> <xsd:element name="Message" type="MessageType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="BasePerilType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="PerilDescription" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="KindOfLoss" type="KindOfLossType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xsd:element name="CoverageCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Premium" type="xsd:double"/> <xsd:element name="RateFactor" type="xsd:float"/> <xsd:element name="Deductible" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="Limit" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="Zone" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Message" type="MessageType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="KindOfLossType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="LossCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="LossDescription" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ContentType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ContentURL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="MIMEType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Expiry" type="xsd:dateTime" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="BaseImageType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ID" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ImageExpiryDate" type="xsd:date"/> <xsd:element name="ImageURL" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="DisplayOrder" type="xsd:integer"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="iClarifyResidentialProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ConstructionFeatures" type="ResponseResidentialConstructionFeaturesType"/> <xsd:element name="Valuation" type="ValuationType"/> <xsd:element name="Images" type="ImagesType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ImagesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Image" type="ResidentialImageType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResidentialImageType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseImageType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ImageTypeCode" type="ResidentialImageryCode"/> <xsd:element name="ProviderCode" type="ResidentialImageryProvider"/> <xsd:element name="BestPhoto" type="xsd:boolean"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ResponseResidentialConstructionFeaturesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="YearBuilt" type="YearBuiltType"/> <xsd:element name="SquareFootage" type="SquareFootageType"/> <xsd:element name="FoundationType" type="FoundationType"/> <xsd:element name="ArchitecturalStyleType" type="ArchitecturalStyleType"/> <xsd:element name="StoreyCount" type="ResidentialStoreyCountType"/> <xsd:element name="KitchenCount" type="ResidentialKitchenCountType"/> <xsd:element name="BathroomCount" type="ResidentialBathroomCountType"/> <xsd:element name="ExteriorWallType" type="ExteriorWallType"/> <xsd:element name="RoofType" type="RoofType"/> <xsd:element name="FinishedBasement" type="FinishedBasementType"/> <xsd:element name="GarageType" type="GarageType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="GarageNumberOfCars" type="GarageNumberOfCarsType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="SwimmingPoolType" type="SwimmingPoolType"/> <xsd:element name="PrimaryHeatingType" type="PrimaryHeatingType"/> <xsd:element name="AuxiliaryHeatingType" type="AuxiliaryHeatingType"/> <xsd:element name="PlumbingType" type="PlumbingType"/> <xsd:element name="CommercialIndicator" type="xsd:boolean"/> <xsd:element name="OutbuildingPresent" type="BooleanWithUnknownType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="ValuationType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="ReplacementCost" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="CostPerSquareFoot" type="xsd:double"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="ResidentialImageryCode"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Street"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Satellite"/> <xsd:enumeration value="StaticSatelliteHigh"/> <xsd:enumeration value="StaticSatelliteLow"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="ResidentialImageryProvider"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="ILookAbout"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Google"/> <xsd:enumeration value="WIES"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialPerilScoreProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="AllPerilsScore" type="CommercialPerilScoreType"/> <xsd:element name="PropertyPerilScores" type="PropertyCommercialPerilsType"/> <xsd:element name="CasualtyPerilScores" type="CasualtyCommercialPerilsType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialPerilScoreType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="LossCostScore" type="xsd:integer"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="PropertyCommercialPerilsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Peril" type="PropertyCommercialPerilScoreType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CasualtyCommercialPerilsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Peril" type="CasualtyCommercialPerilScoreType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="PropertyCommercialPerilScoreType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="CommercialPerilScoreType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="PerilType" type="PropertyCommercialPerilType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CasualtyCommercialPerilScoreType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="CommercialPerilScoreType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="PerilType" type="CasualtyCommercialPerilType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="PropertyCommercialPerilType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="AllProperty"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Crime"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Fire"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Water"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Wind"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Hail"/> <xsd:enumeration value="VehicleImpact"/> <xsd:enumeration value="OtherBusinessInterruption"/> <xsd:enumeration value="OtherProperty"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="CasualtyCommercialPerilType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="AllCasualty"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Automobile"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Employers"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Professional"/> <xsd:enumeration value="PremisesOperations"/> <xsd:enumeration value="ProductsCompletedOperations"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="iClarifyCommercialOccupancyProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Occupant" type="CommercialOccupant" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialOccupant"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="PrimaryName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Industry" type="CommercialOccupancyIndustryType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="CompanyFirmographics" type="CommercialOccupancyFirmographicsType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="ParentCompanyFirmographics" type="CommercialOccupancyFirmographicsType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="Credit" type="CommercialOccupancyCreditType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialOccupancyFirmographicsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="YearEstablished" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="NumberOfEmployees" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="TotalSales" type="xsd:double" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="CurrencyCode" type="CurrencyType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialOccupancyIndustryType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="SICCode" type="SICCodeType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="SICCodeDescription" type="MultilingualStringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="IBCCode" type="IBCCodeType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="IBCCodeDescription" type="MultilingualStringType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="NAICSCode" type="NAICSCodeType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="NAICSCodeDescription" type="MultilingualStringType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialOccupancyCreditType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="CreditDelinquencyScore" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="BusinessFailureRiskScore" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="FUSProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Dwelling" type="FUSProductDwellingType"/> <xsd:element name="Commercial" type="FUSProductCommercialType"/> <xsd:element name="EarthquakeCodes" type="EarthquakeCodesType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="HydrantCounts" type="HydrantCountsType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="FUSProductDwellingType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RespondingFirehall" type="FirehallType"/> <xsd:element name="DwellingGrades" type="DwellingGradesType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="DwellingGradesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="HydrantProtectedGrade" type="DwellingProtectedGradeType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> <xsd:element name="FirehallProtectedGrade" type="DwellingProtectedGradeType" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="AllOtherAreasGrade" type="DwellingProtectedGradeType" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="DwellingProtectedGradeType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Grade" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="WaterSystem" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="FUSProductCommercialType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RespondingFirehall" type="FirehallType"/> <xsd:element name="CommercialGrade" type="CommercialGradeType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="CommercialGradeType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="PublicFireProtectionClassification" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="RiskSCORDetail" type="RiskSCORDetailType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="2"/> <xsd:element name="WaterSystem" type="xsd:string" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="1"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RiskSCORDetailType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RiskSCOR" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="Type" type="RiskSCORType"/> <xsd:element name="Adjustment" type="RiskSCORAdjustmentType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="2"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="RiskSCORAdjustmentType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="AdjustmentType" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Adjustment" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="RiskSCORType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Conditional"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Unconditional"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="FirehallType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RoadDistanceKilometres" type="xsd:float"/> <xsd:element name="GoverningAgency" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="ProtectionGradeTerritories"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Commercial" type="ProtectionGradeTerritoryType"/> <xsd:element name="Dwelling" type="ProtectionGradeTerritoryType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="FirefightersPerFireStation"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="FullTime" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="Volunteer" type="xsd:integer"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="TankerCapacityImperialGallons" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="PumperFlowImperialGallonsPerMinute" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="SuperiorTankerServiceAccreditationDate" type="xsd:date" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="GradingDate" type="xsd:date"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="ProtectionGradeTerritoryType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:pattern value="^\d{1,2}$"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:complexType name="EarthquakeCodesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="EarthquakeCode" type="EarthquakeCodeType" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="EarthquakeCodeType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Zone" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="Description" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element name="SystemName" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="HydrantCountsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="HydrantCount" type="HydrantCountType" maxOccurs="2"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="HydrantCountType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="RadiusMetres" type="HydrantRadiusMetresType"/> <xsd:element name="NumberOfHydrants" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="Ownership" type="HydrantOwnershipType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="HydrantRadiusMetresType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:integer"> <xsd:enumeration value="150"/> <xsd:enumeration value="300"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> <xsd:simpleType name="HydrantOwnershipType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="Public"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Private"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="PerilScoreProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Perils" type="PerilScorePerilsType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="PerilScorePerilsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Peril" type="PerilScorePerilType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="PerilScorePerilType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BasePerilType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="FrequencyScore" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="SeverityScore" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="LossCostScore" type="xsd:integer" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="PredictedFrequency" type="xsd:double" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="PredictedSeverity" type="xsd:double" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="PredictedLossCost" type="xsd:double" minOccurs="0"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSTypes.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="FloodScoreProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Perils" type="FloodScorePerilsType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="FloodScorePerilsType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Peril" type="FloodScorePerilType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="FloodScorePerilType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BasePerilType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="AverageAnnualLossValues" type="AverageAnnualLossValuesType"/> <xsd:element name="FloodScore" type="xsd:integer"/> <xsd:element name="PurePremium" type="xsd:double" minOccurs="0"/> <xsd:element name="FloodMap" type="FloodMapType" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="3"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="AverageAnnualLossValuesType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Building" type="xsd:float"/> <xsd:element name="Contents" type="xsd:float"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="FloodMapType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="FloodEvent" type="FloodEventType"/> <xsd:element name="Content" type="ContentType"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="FloodEventType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="50"/> <xsd:enumeration value="100"/> <xsd:enumeration value="1000"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0" elementFormDefault="qualified" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0"> <xsd:include schemaLocation="http://st1.optaintel.ca/OSSProxyCT/?xsd=OSSResponse.xsd"/> <xsd:complexType name="InspectionAttributesProductType"> <xsd:complexContent> <xsd:extension base="BaseProductType"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="Score" type="InspectionAttributesScore" minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="12"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:extension> </xsd:complexContent> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="InspectionAttributesScore"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element name="InspectionRecommendationType" type="InspectionRecommendationType"/> <xsd:element name="Score" type="xsd:double"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:simpleType name="InspectionRecommendationType"> <xsd:restriction base="xsd:string"> <xsd:enumeration value="CentralHeating"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Chimney"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Electrical"/> <xsd:enumeration value="FuelTank"/> <xsd:enumeration value="InternalFireDamage"/> <xsd:enumeration value="InternalWaterDamage"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Liability"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Plumbing"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Roof"/> <xsd:enumeration value="Stove"/> <xsd:enumeration value="SumpSewer"/> <xsd:enumeration value="WashingMachine"/> </xsd:restriction> </xsd:simpleType> </xsd:schema>

con:call.name: Request 1
con:call.con:request: <soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:ns="http://www.optaintel.ca/ws/OptaSingleService/1.0">\r <soapenv:Header/>\r <soapenv:Body>\r <ns:OSSRequest>\r <ns:RequestHeader>\r <ns:RequestID>?</ns:RequestID>\r <ns:RequestSentTimestamp>?</ns:RequestSentTimestamp>\r <ns:Requestor>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:Carrier>?</ns:Carrier>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:Brokerage>?</ns:Brokerage>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:Username>?</ns:Username>\r </ns:Requestor>\r </ns:RequestHeader>\r <ns:RequestBody>\r <!--1 to 10 repetitions:-->\r <ns:Address>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:AddressID>?</ns:AddressID>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:OptaAddressKey>?</ns:OptaAddressKey>\r <!--You have a CHOICE of the next 2 items at this level-->\r <ns:StreetAddress>?</ns:StreetAddress>\r <ns:StreetNumber>?</ns:StreetNumber>\r <ns:StreetName>?</ns:StreetName>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:StreetType>?</ns:StreetType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:StreetDirection>?</ns:StreetDirection>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:UnitNumber>?</ns:UnitNumber>\r <ns:Municipality>?</ns:Municipality>\r <ns:Province>?</ns:Province>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:PostalCode>?</ns:PostalCode>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:UserProvidedConstructionFeatures>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:YearBuilt>?</ns:YearBuilt>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:SquareFootage>?</ns:SquareFootage>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:FoundationType>?</ns:FoundationType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:ArchitecturalStyleType>?</ns:ArchitecturalStyleType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:StoreyCount>?</ns:StoreyCount>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:KitchenCount>?</ns:KitchenCount>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:BathroomCount>?</ns:BathroomCount>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:ExteriorWallType>?</ns:ExteriorWallType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:RoofType>?</ns:RoofType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:FinishedBasement>?</ns:FinishedBasement>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:GarageType>?</ns:GarageType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:GarageNumberOfCars>?</ns:GarageNumberOfCars>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:SwimmingPoolType>?</ns:SwimmingPoolType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:PrimaryHeatingType>?</ns:PrimaryHeatingType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:AuxiliaryHeatingType>?</ns:AuxiliaryHeatingType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:PlumbingType>?</ns:PlumbingType>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:CommercialIndicator>?</ns:CommercialIndicator>\r <!--Optional:-->\r <ns:OutbuildingPresent>?</ns:OutbuildingPresent>\r </ns:UserProvidedConstructionFeatures>\r </ns:Address>\r <ns:RequestedProducts>\r <!--1 or more repetitions:-->\r <ns:Product>?</ns:Product>\r </ns:RequestedProducts>\r </ns:RequestBody>\r </ns:OSSRequest>\r </soapenv:Body>\r </soapenv:Envelope>
